summary.summary: In CarbRatioCalibrationStateModel.swift, the coreDataPublisher initialization was changed to use CoreDataStack.shared.entityChangePublisher instead of changedObjectsOnManagedObjectContextDidSavePublisher(observing: .inserted) (source: diff:7d49e77e3b96, file:2205890d1e0f). The commit message describes this as a refactor to use a centralized publisher for maintainability and performance (source: commit:94a062231847).
summary.userFacingImpact: This appears to be a refactor that centralizes the Core Data change publisher and is likely intended to improve maintainability/performance (source: commit:94a062231847). The change replaces the publisher used for the module's "Auto-refresh when new determinations arrive (updates IOB/COB)" logic (source: diff:7d49e77e3b96, file:2205890d1e0f). Evidence in the supplied change does not contain runtime tests or behavior comparisons, so it is insufficient to rule out subtle runtime or timing differences that could affect auto-refresh behavior; human review and testing are recommended (source: diff:7d49e77e3b96).
